title: Registration for BdMSO 2026 National Qualifying Round is now open.
excerpt: Students from Class 3 to 6 can now register through the official portal. Deadline: May 15, 2026. Read the complete eligibility and schedule inside.

title: Announcing the dates for the National Residential Camp.
